title: hebe raoulii
intro: Hebe raoulii, also known as the 'Puriri Hebe', is a small shrub native to New Zealand, belonging to the hebe family of plants. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Hebe raoulii have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Hebe raoulii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potential uses in treating colds, flu, and skin conditions. Hebe raoulii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
